scripts.dev:playground: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground dev
scripts.dev:playground-tw: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground-tw dev
scripts.dev:docs: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-docs dev
scripts.build:playground: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground build
scripts.typecheck:apps: pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground exec nuxi prepare && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground exec vue-tsc -p .nuxt/tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground-tw exec nuxi prepare && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-playground-tw exec vue-tsc -p .nuxt/tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-docs exec nuxi prepare && pnpm --filter nuxt-photo-docs exec vue-tsc -p .nuxt/tsconfig.app.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm run typecheck:apps
scripts.test:module-package: pnpm --filter @nuxt-photo/nuxt build && node --input-type=module -e "const mod = await import(new URL('./packages/nuxt/dist/module.mjs', import.meta.url)); if (!mod.default) throw new Error('Missing default export from built module')"
scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:module-package && pnpm test:e2e
